data.reason: Salesforce API returned 429 Too Many Requests
data.message:
Fivetran sync failed at 2024-06-15 03:15:22 UTC

Connector: salesforce_prod
Destination: snowflake_warehouse
Schema: salesforce

Error Details:
API rate limit exceeded for Salesforce connector.
Received HTTP 429 from Salesforce API endpoint.
Rate limit: 15000 requests per 24 hours.
Current usage: 15234 requests.
Reset time: 2024-06-15 12:00:00 UTC

Affected tables:
- salesforce.account (partial sync)
- salesforce.opportunity (failed)
- salesforce.contact (not started)

Last successful sync: 2024-06-14 03:15:22 UTC
Rows synced before failure: 45,231

Recommendation: Wait for rate limit reset or increase API quota with Salesforce.
